rawContext:
## Architecture

The payments service sits behind an API gateway and orchestrates Stripe, the ledger DB, and a payout worker.
mermaidCode:
flowchart LR
    Client[Client App] --> Gateway[API Gateway]
    Gateway --> Auth[Auth Service]
    Gateway --> Pay[Payments Service]
    Pay --> Stripe[Stripe API]
    Pay --> Ledger[(Ledger DB)]
    Pay --> Queue[[Payout Queue]]
    Queue --> Worker[Payout Worker]
    Worker --> Bank[Bank Transfer API]

rawContext:
## OpenID Connect Flow

This is the standard authorization-code-with-PKCE flow used by every modern SPA.
mermaidCode:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant U as User
    participant SPA as SPA
    participant AS as Auth Server
    participant API as API
    U->>SPA: Click sign in
    SPA->>SPA: Generate PKCE pair
    SPA->>AS: /authorize + code_challenge
    AS->>U: Login + consent
    U->>AS: Approve
    AS-->>SPA: Redirect with code
    SPA->>AS: POST /token + code_verifier
    AS-->>SPA: { access_token, id_token }
    SPA->>API: GET /me
    API-->>SPA: 200 profile

rawContext:
## Domain Model

Classes for the subscription billing engine — products, plans, subscriptions, invoices.
mermaidCode:
classDiagram
    class Product {
        +String id
        +String name
        +List~Plan~ plans
    }
    class Plan {
        +String id
        +Money price
        +String interval
    }
    class Subscription {
        +String id
        +Plan plan
        +Customer customer
        +DateTime startsAt
        +cancel()
        +renew()
    }
    class Invoice {
        +String id
        +Money total
        +String status
    }
    Product "1" --> "*" Plan
    Plan "1" --> "*" Subscription
    Subscription "1" --> "*" Invoice

## Architecture (forked)

mermaidCode:
flowchart LR
    Client[Client App] --> Gateway[API Gateway]
    Gateway --> Auth[Auth Service]
    Gateway --> Pay[Payments Service]
    Pay --> Stripe[Stripe API]
    Pay --> Ledger[(Ledger DB)]
    Pay --> Queue[[Payout Queue]]
    Queue --> Worker[Payout Worker]

    Notify --> Slack[Slack]
